sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115039" key="xrusw/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσ-ώνητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n115039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bought for gold,</tr_> of slaves, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1239.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callistr.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
